title: pachypteris densiflora
intro: Pachypteris densiflora is an ancient plant species from the Mesozoic era, now known as the fern-like tree Calamites. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pachypteris densiflora include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of Pachypteris densiflora typically include drying and grinding the plant into powder, which can be used as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
